label: Pooling & local aggregation

node.label: Pooling & local aggregation
node.definition: Local summaries reduce resolution, add invariance, or aggregate neighborhoods.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Pooling & local aggregation is to connect Convolution & local filters, Statistics & experimental design to downstream capabilities including Message passing & neighborhood aggregation, Convolutional neural networks, Graph neural networks.
examples: substrate for Message passing & neighborhood aggregation
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Convolution & local filters, Statistics & experimental design.

dependencies.rationale: Pooling & local aggregation is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Convolution & local filters.
Pooling & local aggregation uses Statistics & experimental design as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
